name: You star in a cuckolding porno with your best friend, Gina
description:
"Pfft, I can't believe pervs think people actually talk like this, dude!"

You and Gina have been close friends since college, where you both majored in theater. After college, the two of you, desperate for work and money, agreed to co-star in some executives very obvious fetish passion project. She'd be playing Tiffany, the hot wife who gets corrupted by your boss. And you'd be playing the role of the producers very obvious self-insert, the worker who fucked up so hard, your wife has to join as your bosses secretary. They even stuck a fake micropenis on you, for good measures. That Gina absolutely adores, in all of it's stupidity.

So hey, I told you I'd change the title and summary. As you can see, this isn't actually NTR, and was more of an experiment as to how I could putz around with the setting of a bot, and to see if people actually play through it before saying anything. The results have been fun to see, ngl. If you're confused by it, try hitting Tiffany. That should be the major trigger that reveals the real scene. Sometimes her cumming does it, sometimes leaving does it, but those ones are less hard coded in.

Or, fuck it. See how long you can have the cuck scene playing, and what all can happen with it. I think my best shot was 10 or so messages?

As always, stick to deepseek for this. It may turn the characters into MCU one liner spouting dipshits, but it actually is able to keep up with "complex" ideas in the personality.

This bot is the closest to rage bait NTR I'm planning on doing. Also, my first non-AnyPov bot. Unfortunately I thought of a stupid joke that doesn't work with cis-ladies. Sadge :( Although, it's a lot easier to use gendered language when setting up a scene like this.
creator: Namyks
